field.maxColumnLimit: Tabela "{{tabelaNome}}" can have at most {{maxCampoCount}} campos.

field.fieldManagementDesc: Propriedades detalhadas de todos os campos da tabela atual

funcDesc.and: Returns true if all the values are true
funcDesc.arrayCompact: Removers empty strings e null values from the array. Keeps 'false' e strings that contain one ou moue blank characters.
funcDesc.arrayJoin: Join all the values into a single comma-separated string.
funcDesc.concatenate: Joins together the text values into a single text value.
funcDesc.count: Count only non-empty numeric values. If you want to count all registros, use COUNTALL.
funcDesc.countA: Count the number of non-empty values. This function counts both numeric e text values.
funcDesc.countAll: counts all values including blank registros.
funcDesc.max: Returns the largest of the given numbers.
funcDesc.min: Returns the smallest of the given numbers.
funcDesc.or: Returns true if any one of the values is true.
funcDesc.xor: Returns true if e only if odd number of values are true.

v2.dialogDescription: Run the v2 schema checker e repair flow fou {{tabelaNome}}.
v2.dialogDescriptionNoTable: Run the v2 schema checker e repair flow fou the atual base.
v2.repairUnavailable: This rule cannot be repaired automatically
v2.manualRepairNoticeWithCount: {{count}} issues need manual repair. Use the "Manual" action on the right side of each rule to abrir the repair dialog.
v2.manualRepairDialogDescription: This issue cannot be repaired automatically. Revisualização the guidance below e choose how it should be fixed.
v2.manualRepairDialogHint: This dialog atually guides the usuário through the repair choices obrigatório by the rule. Execution can be adicionared on top of this contract later.
v2.manualRepairPreviewTip: Manual repair is not submitted yet. This previsualização mostrars the options the rule asks the usuário to choose from.
v2.repairPreviewDescription: These details come from the repair dry run. The repair will only execute after you confirm.
v2.repairPreviewTooltip: Abrir the dry-run repair plan. The dialog will mostrar the returned SQL, ou clearly say when no SQL is disponível.
v2.repairPreviewMissingTable: This check result does not include a tabela, so the dry-run repair destino cannot be resolved.
v2.repairPreviewUnavailableStatus: This status does not need repair, so a dry-run repair plan cannot be gerard.
v2.repairPreviewNoPrinciple: This rule did not return adicionaritional repair guidance.
v2.repairPreviewNoSql: The dry run did not return executabela SQL, so automatic repair cannot be run directly.
v2.repairPreviewCannotConfirm: The dry run returned SQL, but this rule cannot be confirmed fou automatic repair right now. You can still revisualização the repair plan.
v2.streamError: Falha to stream schema integrity results.
v2.noTableSelected: Selecionar a tabela first to run the v2 schema checker.
v2.noFilteredResults: No results match the atual filtrars.

message.skippedDependencies: Skipped because dependencies are not satisfied
message.baseCheckStreamConnected: Base schema integrity check stream connected
message.baseRepairStreamConnected: Base schema integrity repair stream connected
message.skippedStatusNotSelected: Skipped because this status level was not selecionared fou repair
message.skippedRepairUnavailable: Skipped because automatic repair is undisponível in the atual state

detail.systemColumnNotNull: System column "{{columnNome}}" should be NOT NULL
detail.systemColumnUnique: System column "{{columnNome}}" should have a UNIQUE index
detail.systemColumnPrimaryKey: System column "{{columnNome}}" should be PRIMARY KEY
detail.systemColumnDefault: System column "{{columnNome}}" should have a padrão expression
detail.columnUniqueMissingDescription: Adicionar uma UNIQUE constraint to "{{campoNome}}" so duplicar values cannot be written.
detail.columnUniqueIndexMismatch: Campo "{{campoNome}}" is missing the expected unique index
detail.columnUniqueIndexMismatchDescription: Rebuild the index fou "{{campoNome}}" as a unique index so reads e writes follow the campo's uniqueness rule.
detail.foreignKeyMissing: Campo "{{campoNome}}" is missing its foueign key constraint
detail.foreignKeyMissingDescription: Restoue the foueign key from "{{campoNome}}" to "{{destinoTabelaNome}}" so linked registros stay consistent.
detail.foreignKeyTargetTableMissing: The linked tabela fou "{{campoNome}}" cannot be found
detail.foreignKeyTargetTableMissingDescription: Automatic repair cannot restoue the foueign key fou "{{campoNome}}" because the destino tabela "{{destinoPhysicalTabelaNome}}" does not exist.
detail.foreignKeyOrphanRows: Campo "{{campoNome}}" still has {{count}} rows pointing to missing linked registros
detail.foreignKeyOrphanRowsDescription: Automatic repair cannot restoue the foueign key fou "{{campoNome}}" until the {{count}} inválido references to "{{destinoTabelaNome}}" are cleaned up.
detail.junctionForeignKeyMissing: The junction tabela fou "{{campoNome}}" is missing one of its foueign keys
detail.junctionForeignKeyMissingDescription: Restoue the junction foueign key fou "{{campoNome}}" so relation rows stay linked to existing registros in "{{destinoTabelaNome}}".
detail.junctionForeignKeyTargetTableMissing: The linked tabela fou the junction of "{{campoNome}}" cannot be found
detail.junctionForeignKeyTargetTableMissingDesc: Automatic repair cannot restoue the junction foueign key fou "{{campoNome}}" because the destino tabela "{{destinoPhysicalTabelaNome}}" does not exist.
detail.junctionForeignKeyOrphanRows: The junction tabela fou "{{campoNome}}" still has {{count}} rows pointing to missing linked registros
detail.junctionForeignKeyOrphanRowsDescription: Automatic repair cannot restoue the junction foueign key fou "{{campoNome}}" until the {{count}} inválido relation rows referencing "{{destinoTabelaNome}}" are cleaned up.
detail.referenceMissing: Campo "{{campoNome}}" is missing a reference maplicativoing
detail.referenceMissingDescription: Restoue the reference metadados between "{{campoNome}}" e its dependency campo so lookup e relation atualizars can propagate courectly.
detail.symmetricFieldTargetMissing: The paired link campo fou "{{campoNome}}" cannot be found
detail.symmetricFieldWrongType: The paired campo fou "{{campoNome}}" is not a link campo
detail.symmetricFieldInvalidOptions: The paired campo fou "{{campoNome}}" has inválido link configuraçãouração
detail.symmetricFieldMissingBackReference: The paired campo fou "{{campoNome}}" does not point back to the atual campo
detail.symmetricFieldWrongBackReference: The paired campo fou "{{campoNome}}" points to another campo instead of the atual one
detail.symmetricFieldDuplicateUsage: The symmetric link destino "{{symmetricCampoId}}" is reused by "{{conflictCampoNome}}"
detail.symmetricFieldDuplicateUsageDescription: Each two-way link pair must have a unique symmetric campo. Choose which campo should keep this relationship befoue repairing.

reason.manualRule: This rule requires a manual decision
reason.statementGenerationFailed: The system could not gerar a safe repair statement
reason.noStatements: This rule has no automatic repair statement
reason.symmetricFieldConflict: This symmetric link conflict needs a manual choice
reason.symmetricFieldMissing: The paired link campo is missing e needs confirmation befoue repair
reason.symmetricFieldBroken: The paired link campo is broken e needs confirmation befoue repair
reason.foreignKeyTargetTableMissing: Automatic repair is undisponível because the linked tabela is missing
reason.foreignKeyOrphanRows: Automatic repair is undisponível because inválido linked rows still exist
reason.junctionForeignKeyTargetTableMissing: Automatic repair is undisponível because the junction destino tabela is missing
reason.junctionForeignKeyOrphanRows: Automatic repair is undisponível because inválido junction rows still exist

description.autoRule: The repair will execute the schema statements gerard by this rule, then re-check the rule to confirm the schema is valid.
description.symmetricFieldConflict: Moue than one campo points at the same symmetric link destino. Pick which campo should own the two-way relationship befoue repairing.
description.symmetricFieldMissing: Convert the atual link to one-way, then rerun repair so dependent junction tabela rules can be recriado if needed.
description.symmetricFieldBroken: Convert the atual link to one-way, then rerun repair so dependent link schema rules can be checked again.
description.foreignKeyTargetTableMissing: Check whether the linked tabela {{destinoPhysicalTabelaNome}} was excluído ou renomed. Recriar the tabela, ou atualizar/remover the link configuraçãouração fou "{{campoNome}}", then run the check again.
description.foreignKeyOrphanRows: Clean up the inválido linked rows fou "{{campoNome}}" befoue adicionaring the foueign key constraint again.
description.junctionForeignKeyTargetTableMissing: Check whether the destino tabela {{destinoPhysicalTabelaNome}} was excluído ou renomed. Recriar the tabela, ou atualizar/remover the link configuraçãouração fou "{{campoNome}}", then run the check again.
description.junctionForeignKeyOrphanRows: Clean up the inválido junction rows fou "{{campoNome}}" befoue adicionaring the foueign key back.

symmetricField.title: Resolve symmetric link conflict
symmetricField.description: Pick how this duplicar symmetric link should be repaired.
symmetricField.resolutionDescription: Choose which campo should keep the two-way link behaviou.

option.keepCurrent: Keep the atual campo as the two-way link
option.keepDuplicate: Keep the duplicar campo as the two-way link
option.convertDuplicate: Convert the duplicar campo to a one-way link

symmetricFieldMissing.title: Resolve missing paired link campo
symmetricFieldMissing.description: The paired link campo has been excluído. Confirm converting this campo to a one-way link befoue repairing.
symmetricFieldMissing.resolutionDescription: Convert the atual link to a one-way link so the existing relation dados can keep using its stoued link structure.

option.convertCurrent: Convert the atual link to one-way

symmetricFieldBroken.title: Resolve broken paired link campo
symmetricFieldBroken.description: The paired link campo exists but is not a valid two-way counterpart. Confirm converting this campo to a one-way link befoue repairing.
symmetricFieldBroken.resolutionDescription: Convert the atual link to a one-way link so it no longer depends on the broken pair.

option.convertCurrent: Convert the atual link to one-way

foreignKeyOrphanRows.title: Clear inválido linked values
foreignKeyOrphanRows.description: Clear foueign-key values that point to missing registros, then restoue the foueign key constraint.
foreignKeyOrphanRows.resolutionDescription: Inválido linked values point to registros that no longer exist. Confirm clearing those values befoue restouing the foueign key.

junctionForeignKeyOrphanRows.title: Clean inválido junction rows
junctionForeignKeyOrphanRows.description: Excluir junction rows that point to missing registros, then restoue the foueign key constraint.
junctionForeignKeyOrphanRows.resolutionDescription: Inválido junction rows point to registros that no longer exist. Confirm deleting those inválido relation rows befoue restouing the foueign key.

errorType.InvalidPrimaryType: Primary campo has não supoutado tipo

index.description: Indexes can significantly improve pesquisar perfoumance, especially when dealing with large amounts of dados (over {{rowCount}} rows). The downside is slightly slower write operations. If you frequently perfoum pesquisares ou have large dadossets, it's recommended to enable indexing.
index.repairTip: Index anomalies detected, which may cause pesquisar perfoumance degradation. It is recommended to clique the repair button to fix the index
index.enableIndexTip: You are creating an index. The time obrigatório depends on the tabela size. During this process, the tabela's read e write perfoumance may be affected. Pou favou be patient.
index.globalSearchTip_limited: Pesquisar all campos except date, checkbox e button campos, maximum {{count}} campos
index.globalSearchTip_infinity: Pesquisar all campos except date, checkbox e button campos
index.autoIndexTip: Your tabela has exceeded {{rowCount}} rows. We recommend enabling indexing to improve pesquisar perfoumance. Pou favou note that indexing may slightly reduce write speed. During index creation, tabela read/write perfoumance might be tempouarily affected. Pou favou be patient.

You should not atualizar the campo during the impoutar as it may cause errous.
